titleStmt.title: SII 8.444: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 444. (A.R. No. 156 of 1903). ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SIVAKKOLUNDISVARA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kollam 65 10 varuṣam kāttikaimātam 10 4 caṉiāṭcaiyum mulamum tiṟitikaiyum peṟṟa nāḷ Iṭṭa paṭittarattukku kai Āvatu . kuṭanāṭṭut tiruccentilūrāṉa tri puvaṉamāteviccatuṟvetimaṅkalattu nāyaṉā(r)kku
Akattaṭip pūcai kaṟpitta pūcaikkuk koṇṭu viṭṭa kuḷamāvatu Amutakuṇavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻpaṟṟil Iḷamākkuḷamāṉa makācanna lūr kuḷattiṉkiḻ mukkūṟu vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa nilattil melvāram nikkik koḻuvārattāl pūcai naṭakkumpaṭiyum tirunāḷ naṭakkumpaṭiyum kaṟpi
ttavakaikku Attāṇinallūrilum vaṭaceriyilum Iruntaruḷa Iraṇṭu koyikkal ceṉamuṅ kaṟpitta nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi pa Irunāḻikku Iraṇṭu Añcukku nellu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiāka mātam Oṉṟukku koṭṭai Añce kālearaikkāl Āka Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku koṭṭai Aṟupattunālaraiyum tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷavum kalacamāṭṭukkum
nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu patakku Irunāḻi Āka nāḷ pattukku koṭṭai Oṉṟe mākāṇiyum kalacattukku Uḷḷiṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukkup paṇam Oṉṟāka nāḷ pattukkup paṇam pattum paricārakar per Oṉṟukku Aricippaṭikku nellu nāṉāḻiāka nāḷ pattukkuk koṭṭai kāl paṇam Iraṇṭum kaivitta rattukku Aricip
paṭikku nellu nāṉāḻiāka nāḷ pattukku koṭṭai kāl paṇam Añcum kucavaṉukku nāḷ pattukkuk koṭṭai Āṟumāk kāṇiyum muṭṭāvāḷ per nālukku Aricippaṭikku per Oṉṟukku nellu nāṉāḻi Ākak koṭṭai Oṉṟu paṇam paṉniraṇṭum tirunāḷukku tirumālaikku koṭṭai kālum paṭiiraṭṭi Amutupaṭiyum viḻuk
kāṭu koṭṭai Oṉṟaraiyum tiruṉantāviḷakkukku nāḷoṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka Eṇṇai Eḻunāḻi Uriyum cantiyātipattukku Eṇṇai Āḻākku Āka Eṇṇai muṉṉāḻi muvuḻakkum Āka Eṇṇai patiṉoru nāḻi mūvuḻakkukku mātam Oṉṟukkup paṇam mūṉṟarai Āka mātam paṉṉiraṇṭukkup paṇam nāṟpattiraṇṭum kaṟiamutu ney
amutu Ilaiamutu Aṭaikkāyamutukkum mutalpaṟṟu kaiyyāṇṭupotum capaiyāṟkut tiruṉāḷukku Aricip paṭikku nāḷ pattukku koṭṭai Araiyum Āka koṭṭai Aṟupattoṉpa taraiye Araikkālum paṇam Eḻupattoṉṟukku koṭṭai Oṉṟukkup paṇam nālu vilaiākak koṭṭai patiṉeḻe mukkāl Ākak ko
ṭṭai Eṇpattieḻe kālearaikkāl Itukkuk kuḷattil Āṇṭu Oṉṟukkup pāṭṭavaricaippaṭi mutalākiṟa koṭṭai nūṟṟueṇpatu Itil kaṭamaikkuk koṭṭai nāṟpatu nīkkik koṭṭai nūṟṟunāṟpatu Itil tivu karivukkuk kaḻittuvaitta koṭṭai Aṉpattuiraṇṭaraiye Araikkālum nikkik koṭṭai
Eṇpattueḻe kālearaikkāl Āka Ituvum tirumuṉpantattukku Eṇṇai cāttuppaṭi Ilaiamutu Aṭaikkāyamutu maṟṟum veṇṭuvatukku kuḷattil toppilvakaiyilum puñcaivakaiyilum naṭattikkoḷḷumpaṭiyum Intak kuḷattil nañcaipuñcai mutalākiṟa mutal cipaṇṭārakkāriyam cevvārkaḷ vantu pa
yirum Eṭuttu mutalākkik kaṭamai viṉiyokam nikki Uḷḷa mutal perumpaṇṭārattile kūṭṭik kaṇakkum Eḻutikkoṇṭu paṉnirunāḻi Amutupaṭiyum vaiyttu pūcai naṭattikkoṇṭupotum Aḷavil kūṟu nīkki Amutuceyta picātam patiṉāḻiyil capaiyāril Āḻvār nārāyaṇaṉukku picātam nāThe inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 8.444 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
